name: Resume Parser - Gmail to ATS
description: Parses resumes from email attachments, extracts structured data using AI, validates the output, creates candidate records in the ATS, and notifies the hiring team. Handles non-JSON AI responses and missing fields gracefully.

parameters.content:
## Resume Parser
**Flow:**
1. Gmail trigger fires on emails with subject containing "Application" and an attachment
2. Extracts the resume attachment (.pdf/.doc/.docx) as binary
3. Sends the acknowledgment email immediately (doesn't wait on parsing)
4. Extracts text from PDF resumes using the binary data extraction node
5. AI parses the resume text into structured JSON, with a fallback if the model returns malformed JSON
6. Validates required fields before inserting into the ATS database
7. Notifies #hiring on Slack

**Note:** this template only handles .pdf resumes for text extraction out of the box. .doc/.docx resumes are saved but flagged for manual review, since reliable serverless DOC parsing needs an external converter (e.g. CloudConvert, LibreOffice headless) which isn't included here.

**Setup required:** Gmail OAuth2, OpenAI API key, Postgres ATS database, Slack credentials.

parameters.subject: Application Received
parameters.html:
Hi there,

Thank you for applying! We've received your resume and our team will review it shortly.

Best,
HR Team

parameters.columns: name, email, status, source, applied_at, notes
parameters.values: ={{ [['Unknown (' + $('Extract Resume').item.json.filename + ')', $('Extract Resume').item.json.from, 'Needs Manual Review', 'Email Application', new Date().toISOString(), 'DOC/DOCX format - automatic text extraction not supported, review attachment manually']] }}

values.content: Extract candidate info from the resume text. Respond with ONLY a JSON object, no markdown formatting, no explanation. Use this exact shape: {"name": string, "email": string, "phone": string, "skills": string[], "experience_years": number, "education": string, "current_title": string, "companies": string[]}. If a field cannot be determined, use null for strings/numbers or an empty array for arrays.

parameters.columns: name, email, phone, skills, experience_years, education, current_title, companies, status, source, applied_at
name, email, status, source, applied_at, notes
parameters.values: ={{ [['Unknown - ' + $json.filename, $json.from, 'Needs Manual Review', 'Email Application', new Date().toISOString(), 'AI parsing failed on resume text, review attachment manually. Raw AI output saved in notes.']] }}

parameters.text:
⚠️ A resume came in but couldn't be auto-parsed (either AI parsing failed or it's a DOC/DOCX file). It's logged in the ATS with status 'Needs Manual Review' — please check it manually.

*From:* {{ $json.from || $json.applicantEmail }}
